orgSwitcher.label: Organization
orgSwitcher.deleteWarning: This is permanent. All projects, issues, events, alert rules, and destinations under this organization will be deleted.
orgSwitcher.deleteBody: Type the organization name to confirm.

auth.loginHint: Sign in with your organization account

onboarding.title: Create a project
onboarding.errorOrgName: Organization name must be at least 2 characters
onboarding.errorProjectName: Project name must be at least 2 characters
onboarding.successDsnHint: Copy this DSN into your app's config — it's the only way the SDK can authenticate to ingest.

projects.title: Projects
projects.empty: No projects yet — create one to start receiving events.
projects.orgNotFound: Organization not found in your memberships.
projects.archiveBody: Archive "{{name}}"? It will disappear from the project list, but its issues and events stay accessible by direct ID for incident review.
projects.archiveHint: This action is reversible from the database, but no UI to unarchive yet.
projects.dsnHint: Copy this DSN into your app's config — it's the only way the SDK can authenticate to ingest.
projects.dsnRetryHint: The project was created but the DSN could not be generated. Retry to issue one now, or open the project later to issue it from the keys settings.

issues.title: Issues
issues.empty: No issues — your code is healthy.
issues.invalidProjectId: Invalid project — pick a project from the sidebar.

alertDestinations.title: Alert destinations
alertDestinations.empty: No destinations yet — add one so alert rules have somewhere to fire.
alertDestinations.kindLocked: Kind cannot be changed after create — make a new destination instead.
alertDestinations.name: Name
alertDestinations.configCreateHint: Per-kind shape — e.g. Telegram needs chatId, Slack needs webhookUrl. Stored encrypted.
alertDestinations.configEditHint: Re-enter the full config to save. The previous config is encrypted server-side and not shown back.
alertDestinations.errorConfigShape: Config must be a JSON object

alertRules.title: Alert rules
alertRules.empty: No alert rules yet — create one to start firing notifications on incoming issues.
alertRules.name: Name
alertRules.conditionsHint: DSL: level.in, firstSeenWindow (ISO-8601), occurrenceThreshold, tag.{key,in}. All AND-ed.
alertRules.throttleHint: Skip firing again within this window. 0 disables throttling.
alertRules.needDestinations: Add a destination first — rules need somewhere to fan out to.
alertRules.errorConditionsShape: Conditions must be a JSON object

billing.title: Billing
billing.capExceeded: Monthly event cap exceeded — new events are dropped until next renewal.
billing.paymentFailedBody: Update your payment method within {{days}} day(s) — otherwise your plan will be downgraded to Free.

tokens.title: Personal access tokens
tokens.intro: Create a token to authenticate the CLI or scripts as you. Tokens carry your full membership scope, so treat them like passwords.
tokens.issuedHint: Copy this now — it will not be shown again.
tokens.empty: No tokens yet — create one above.
tokens.revokeBody: This is irreversible. Any client using this token will start receiving 401 immediately.
